[Double Reward Campaign Preview]

From 10/3 (Mon), Bounty & Schedule rewards will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your student!

🗓️Period: 10/3 (Mon) 19:00 – 10/10 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
